title: Quick Add button & ⌘N shortcut
description: A floating + button now lives in the bottom-right corner so you can create a deal, contact, or company from anywhere in the app. Press ⌘N (Ctrl+N on Windows) for the same result.

title: Market Intelligence Hub
description: The new Market Intelligence section consolidates Sales Comps, Rate Comps, Demographics, and Capital Markets data into a single research workspace. Access it from the sidebar under Analysis.

title: Document Intelligence V2
description: Dual-pipeline document processing now supports P&L, Cash Flow, and Rent Roll extraction with confidence scoring and a human-in-the-loop review wizard. Drag files straight onto the upload dropzone.

title: Role-based onboarding
description: New users now pick their role (Investor, Broker, Operator, GP, Analyst) on first login. The sidebar, quick-start checklist, and default views all adapt to match how you work.

title: Portfolio Dashboard
description: The Portfolio Dashboard aggregates returns, utilization, and key metrics across all your modeled assets in one view. Drill into any asset directly from the summary cards.

title: P&L Anomaly Intelligence
description: AI-powered anomaly detection now flags unusual line items in uploaded P&L statements, highlights seasonal outliers, and surfaces potential misclassifications before you finalize underwriting.
